content.summary: Guide customers through roaming readiness, activation checks and travel support steps.
content.customerAnswer: Before travelling, open the Zain Iraq app or contact support to confirm roaming is active. Restart the device after arrival and choose a partner network if automatic selection does not connect.
content.agentNote: Verify line status, roaming eligibility, spend controls and active package before escalation.
steps: Escalate if partner network attach fails
